title: Surgeon Vacancy at GE Healthcare India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at GE Healthcare India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!
